svg.title: Project Bedrock — AWS EKS microservices platform architecture
svg.desc: Layered enterprise architecture: users hit an ALB at the edge, traffic flows through a Kubernetes ingress controller into an EKS cluster running retail microservices across private subnets in multiple AZs, backed by managed RDS and DynamoDB, secured by IRSA and External Secrets Operator syncing from AWS Secrets Manager, observed by CloudWatch Container Insights, and deployed via GitHub Actions running Terraform with remote state in S3.
svg.text: Production EKS microservices platform on AWS
Managed node groups · EC2 t3.micro · HPA enabled
Managed node groups · Multi-AZ worker pool
